query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A large tree with dense foliage stands prominently in the foreground on a grassy strip between a sidewalk and a road at night. A red fire hydrant sits on the grass near the curb to the right. Horizontal lines of orange and white light cross the lower left portion of the scene, while streetlights illuminate the roadway in the background. Utility wires stretch across a dark sky above leafy bushes and trees on the far side of the street.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime scene featuring intentional motion blur created by movement during exposure. A large tree with dense foliage stands prominently in the foreground on a grassy lawn next to a sidewalk. A red fire hydrant sits on the grass to the right. Horizontal streaks of orange and white light from passing vehicles cross the lower portion of the frame. Streetlights illuminate the road in the background, while power lines stretch across the dark sky behind leafy bushes and trees lining the opposite side of the street.
